sample_grants.title: Global Energy Alliance for People and Planet
sample_grants.description: The Global Energy Alliance for People and Planet works in partnership with countries across Africa, Asia, Latin America and the Caribbean to reduce greenhouse gas emissions and enable a sustainable energy future for people who need it most.

sample_grants.title: Donation: Emergency response to the people of the Ukraine
sample_grants.description: Programme: Special Initiatives. Description: The IKEA Foundation provided an exceptional donation to the emergency response by UNHCR, the UN Refugee Agency, to both help people who have been forcibly displaced by the conflict in Ukraine and

sample_grants.title: Powering Health
sample_grants.description: Programme: Emissions Reduction. Description: The IKEA Foundation is supporting SELCO to integrate sustainable energy solutions, efficient equipment and energy design elements into 25,000 health care facilities across India by 2026.

sample_grants.title: Drive Electric Campaign: Leapfrogging Partnership
sample_grants.description: Programme: Real Economy. Description: The Drive Electric Campaign's Leapfrogging Partnership is a philanthropic initiative to supercharge the transition to zero-emission vehicles in emerging markets across Africa, Latin America and Southeas

sample_grants.title: Co-Impact: Systems Change Fund
sample_grants.description: The IKEA Foundation is partnering with Co-Impact to support its efforts to change systems and improve collaboration between donors so that millions of people in low-and middle-income countries can benefit from a better humanitarian system.

sample_grants.title: Global Methane Hub
sample_grants.description: Programme: Emissions Reduction. Description: The IKEA Foundation is a part of the Global Methane Hub, a major philanthropic initiative to support nations that have pledged to rapidly reduce their methane emissions.

sample_grants.title: We Mean Business 2017-2021
sample_grants.description: The We Mean Business coalition promotes business action on climate change, to keep up the pressure on governments to meet their Paris Agreement commitments. The IKEA Foundation is galvanising the business community to take bold climate acti

sample_grants.title: Sustainable Market Inclusive Livelihood Pathways to Self-Reliance (SMILES)
